1745630.name: Steel Rain - Dawn of the Machines Demo
1745630.description:
An alien invasion has just arrived and turns planet Earth into a war zone. The invaders, a technologically advanced alien race, sent their troops to suppress and dominate Earth's forces. They plant four portals around the globo to send their soldiers. Be preperad for whats coming from those gates and fight this war to save the planet. Have at your disposal a huge arsenal and unique abilities that can be unlocked as the player evolves in the missions.




Third-person control shoting with realistic tank and vehicle mechanics.

Primary and secondary weapons with realistic sounds and effects.

Weapons, Abilities and loots to build your combat machine.



  • Master Ability


    The game has a unique master abilitys such as Call Artillary, oil launchers, missile launchers, bombers and much more.




  • Ability:


    In the game you will also have abilities, which are less powerful, but fast and very useful in combat.




  • And much more;
